identity.name: Church Navigator
identity.description: A faith-based directory that feels like a mindfulness app mixed with a community network. It avoids the sterile 'corporate directory' look in favor of warm, human-centric storytelling.

buttons.primary: bg-[#6c1cff] text-white hover:bg-[#5b17d6] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg shadow-purple-200 hover:shadow-purple-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#6c1cff] border-2 border-[#6c1cff]/10 hover:border-[#6c1cff]/30 hover:bg-purple-50 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-[#6c1cff] hover:bg-purple-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden group

inputs.base: rounded-xl border-slate-200 bg-slate-50/50 focus:bg-white focus:border-[#6c1cff] focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#6c1cff]/10 transition-all h-12 px-4

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

instructions_to_main_agent: THEME: Implement a 'Light Mode' first strategy. The app should feel airy, using generous whitespace.
ROUNDNESS: Override default Shadcn radius to '0.75rem' or '1rem' in `theme.extend.borderRadius`.
SHADOWS: Do not use black shadows. Use colored shadows (purple-tinted) for a premium feel.
FONTS: Use 'Poppins' for everything. Import it from Google Fonts in index.css.

MAP: For the Explore page, use a placeholder Map component (grey background with markers) if Mapbox is not configured, but layout must be split: Filters (Left), List (Middle), Map (Right) or Mobile: List/Map Toggle.
FORMS: Break the 'Add Listing' form into a Multi-step Wizard. Do not show 20 inputs at once.
CARDS: Church cards must show: Image (Top), Name (Bold), Location (Icon), Tags (Pills), and a 'View Profile' button.
NAVBAR: Sticky white navbar with subtle blur `backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80`.
TESTING: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry where possible.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for overlays.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons. Use Lucide React icons.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
